content:
---

Why You



  • Proven narrative precision: published in Baltimore Review, AGNI, Passages North, Bridport Prize, Sweet Lit, and more
  • Experience holding coherence across multi-threaded narratives (Fort Lauderdale showcase)
  • Ability to finish and release work, where I’ve only generated in private

---

Collaboration Structure (4–6 Months)



Phase 1: Narrative Problem-Solving (Weeks 1–3)


  • Explore:
    • How narrative coherence survives distributed decision-making
    • How audience input strengthens rather than dilutes dramatic intent
    • Which parameters define “dramatic agency”
  • Output: A shared “Narrative Dramaturgical Charter”

Phase 2: Prototype Development (Weeks 4–8)
